summary: Created receipt layout component: `src/ui/receipt.ts` exports `ReceiptRow` interface and three pure functions (`createReceiptRow`, `createReceiptTitle`, `createReceipt`) that compose a receipt-style card with title area and variable label/value rows. Added `src/styles/receipt.css` with receipt styling using design tokens (flexbox rows, border separator, mono font, alternating row backgrounds). Imported receipt.css in global.css. All 25 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
